title: Traditional German Braised Lettuce with Spring Onions
description: A hearty and flavorful German-inspired dish featuring sautéed lettuce and spring onions, slow-cooked in a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of tagine and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the sliced spring onions and cook until they start to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the torn lettuce and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the Ethiopian gem spice and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with crumbled feta cheese if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of crusty German bread or boiled potatoes.
